name: I missed some doctor appointments for my comp illness claim, will they cut my benefits?

mainEntity.name: I missed some doctor appointments for my comp illness claim, will they cut my benefits?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes, follow all medical instructions or risk benefit cuts.[1]
acceptedAnswer.description: Yes, Utah allows suspension for refusing reasonable treatment.[1] Compliance is mandatory.[1] Key factors: Document reasons for misses; get approvals; attend rehab.[1] Reschedule immediately and notify carrier. Attorney can argue extenuating circumstances.

description: Yes, follow all medical instructions or risk benefit cuts.[1]
